title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. colorata
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. colorata, also known as Red Clover, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Red Clover include reducing menopausal symptoms, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting bone health. Herbal preparations of Red Clover include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
